title: Pinnamaneni Krishnarao
compiled_truth: Pinnamaneni Krishnarao is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2002-01-15), Pinnamaneni Krishnarao sent 55 and received 373 emails, totalling 428 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (38), [Shirley Crenshaw](people/shirley-crenshaw) (11), [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (11), [Osman Sezgen](people/osman-sezgen) (7), [Vasant Shanbhogue](people/vasant-shanbhogue) (5). Mailbox folders observed: c, calendar, credit, deleted_items, inbox, resumes.
